chunks.title: Instructions for the Stones and Altar
chunks.reason: Moses commands the people to set up stones with the law and build an altar on Mount Ebal.

chunks.title: Call to Listen and Obey
chunks.reason: Moses and the priests address Israel to become a people for Yahweh and listen to His voice.

chunks.title: Placement of Tribes for Blessing and Curse
chunks.reason: Moses instructs which tribes stand on Gerizim to bless and which on Ebal to curse.

chunks.title: The Twelve Curses
chunks.reason: A series of twelve specific curses pronounced by the Levites with the people's response.
